final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion with layered typography and product integration.

Style/medium: modern graphic design poster with artistic typography, layered text composition, contemporary commercial aesthetic
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, complex but organized layout with overlapping text layers, product or main subject partially obscuring typography
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotional content with artistic lettering, stacked fonts creating depth
Scene/backdrop: clean commercial backdrop that supports layered text without visual clutter
Lighting/mood: balanced studio lighting, professional promotional atmosphere
Color palette: vibrant but harmonious colors supporting promotional energy while maintaining readability
Text (verbatim): "跨境电商促销"
Constraints: text must be partially obscured by product or main subject; layered typography must remain legible; complex composition without visual chaos
Avoid: unreadable text due to over-layering, cluttered disorganized layout, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark, 8K stuffer words
